transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-08-24]
[00:00] You: 90-day onboarding plan checkpoints review for our new VP of Engineering.
[00:45] Speaker 1: The first 30-day checkpoint is September 23rd. By that point, the VP should have met all direct reports, completed the technical onboarding, and reviewed the current architecture.
[01:30] Speaker 2: At the 60-day mark — October 23rd — we expect an initial organizational assessment and a draft roadmap for the next quarter.
[02:10] Speaker 3: The 90-day review is November 22nd. That's when we'll evaluate fit and have the VP present a full 6-month engineering strategy.
[02:50] You: Good. There are some near-term milestones too. The VP's first all-hands presentation is next Friday, August 28th.
[03:20] Speaker 1: And the Q4 engineering planning cycle starts October 1st. The VP needs to lead that process, so the onboarding 60-day checkpoint on October 23rd is actually after planning kicks off — we might want to accelerate some technical onboarding.
[04:00] Speaker 2: Good point. I'll set up an accelerated architecture walkthrough for the VP in the first two weeks — let's say by September 7th.
[04:35] Speaker 3: We should also introduce the VP to key customers. I'll set up customer calls for the week of September 14th.
[05:00] You: And the board introduction — the next board meeting is October 8th. The VP should present briefly to the board then.
[05:30] Speaker 1: I'll prep the VP for the board presentation. I'll have briefing materials ready by October 1st.
[05:55] You: Perfect. The 6-month comprehensive review is February 22nd, 2027.

action_items.description: Set up accelerated architecture walkthrough for new VP
action_items.source_quote: I'll set up an accelerated architecture walkthrough for the VP in the first two weeks — let's say by September 7th.

action_items.description: Set up customer introduction calls for new VP
action_items.source_quote: I'll set up customer calls for the week of September 14th.

action_items.description: Prepare board presentation briefing materials for VP
action_items.source_quote: I'll prep the VP for the board presentation. I'll have briefing materials ready by October 1st.

decisions: Q4 engineering planning starts October 1st — VP leads the process
